{{Quote|Tenupe can be a very dangerous planet, as you know.|Jagged Fel|<ref name="Tempest">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref>}}
'''Tenupe''' was a mountainous and tropical [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tenupe system/Legends|Tenupe system]] that was located in the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] and was on the [[Sparkle Run]]. It was orbited by the [[Shattered Moon (Wild Space)|Shattered Moon]]. It had multiple inland seas and was controlled by the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]]; however the planet was captured by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] during the [[Battle of Tenupe]] of the [[Swarm War]] in [[36 ABY]]. [[Jagged Fel]] and [[Alema Rar]] spent two years marooned on the planet after the [[Dark Nest Crisis]] taking away a [[Twi'lek story-chain]] from there.<ref name="Tempest" />

{{Planet-stub}}
